prophecies.a: 人类历史的第一个时代是圣父之纪，对应旧约时代。这是律法与恐惧的时代，人类如奴仆般服从神的诫命。以已婚俗人为代表，象征肉体的生活。这个时代从亚当开始，经历四十二代，至施洗约翰而终结。
prophecies.q_en: Three Ages Theology: Age of the Father
prophecies.a_en: The first age of human history is the Age of the Father, corresponding to the Old Testament era. It is an age of law and fear, in which humanity served God's commandments as slaves. Represented by married laypeople, it symbolizes the life of the flesh. This age began with Adam, lasted forty-two generations, and ended with John the Baptist.

prophecies.a: 人类历史的第二个时代是圣子之纪，对应新约与教会时代。这是信仰与智慧的时代，人类如儿子般顺服。以教士阶层为代表，象征灵与肉之间的生活。这个时代从以利亚开始，同样经历四十二代，将在约阿基姆所处时代的不远之后终结。
prophecies.q_en: Three Ages Theology: Age of the Son
prophecies.a_en: The second age of human history is the Age of the Son, corresponding to the New Testament and Church era. It is an age of faith and wisdom, in which humanity obeys as sons. Represented by the clergy, it symbolizes life between spirit and flesh. This age began with Elijah, likewise lasted forty-two generations, and would end shortly after Joachim's own time.

prophecies.a: 人类历史的第三个时代是圣灵之纪，是即将降临的终极时代。这是爱与自由的时代，人类如朋友般与神同在。以修道士为代表，象征纯粹灵性的生活。在这个时代，人类将获得对神圣真理的圆满理解，不再需要教会的中介，每个人都将直接领受圣灵的光照。
prophecies.q_en: Three Ages Theology: Age of the Spirit
prophecies.a_en: The third age of human history is the Age of the Spirit, the ultimate era about to dawn. It is an age of love and freedom, in which humanity will dwell with God as friends. Represented by monks, it symbolizes purely spiritual life. In this age, humanity will attain full understanding of divine truth, no longer needing the Church as intermediary, as every person will receive the illumination of the Holy Spirit directly.

prophecies.a: 根据四十二代的计算，圣灵之纪将在1260年左右开启。届时将出现一个新的修道团体，引领人类进入冥想与灵性自由的新时代。在此之前，教会将经历巨大的磨难和净化。
prophecies.q_en: The Timing of the Age of the Spirit
prophecies.a_en: Based on the calculation of forty-two generations, the Age of the Spirit would begin around the year 1260. A new monastic order would then appear to lead humanity into a new era of contemplation and spiritual freedom. Before this, the Church would undergo great tribulation and purification.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1260年前后确实出现了重大宗教运动：方济各会和多明我会（1209/1216年成立）被约阿基姆的追随者视为预言中的新修道团体。方济各灵修派领袖热拉尔多于1254年宣称约阿基姆的著作就是「永恒福音」，引发轩然大波。但「圣灵之纪」的全面实现——教会中介的消失和全人类的灵性自由——并未发生。
prophecies.verdict_en: Significant religious movements did emerge around 1260: the Franciscan and Dominican orders (founded 1209/1216) were seen by Joachim's followers as the prophesied new monastic orders. Franciscan Spiritual Gerard of Borgo San Donnino declared Joachim's works the 'Eternal Gospel' in 1254. However, the full realization of the 'Age of the Spirit' — the disappearance of Church mediation and universal spiritual freedom — did not occur.

prophecies.q: 两位新修道领袖的出现
prophecies.a: 在圣灵之纪到来之前，将会出现两位伟大的灵性领袖，各自创建一个新的修道团体。一个团体致力于冥想生活，另一个致力于传道事工。他们将引领教会度过末世的磨难，为圣灵时代做准备。
prophecies.a_en: Before the Age of the Spirit arrives, two great spiritual leaders would appear, each founding a new monastic order. One order would be devoted to contemplative life, the other to preaching. They would guide the Church through end-times tribulation and prepare the way for the Age of the Spirit.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 约阿基姆去世后不久，方济各会（1209年由阿西西的方济各创立，侧重贫穷与冥想）和多明我会（1216年由圣多明我创立，侧重传道与教育）相继成立。许多同时代人——尤其是方济各灵修派——将此视为约阿基姆预言的应验。但两个修道会的实际发展方向与约阿基姆的理想化描述存在差异。
prophecies.verdict_en: Shortly after Joachim's death, the Franciscan Order (founded 1209 by Francis of Assisi, emphasizing poverty and contemplation) and the Dominican Order (founded 1216 by Saint Dominic, emphasizing preaching and education) were established. Many contemporaries — especially the Franciscan Spirituals — saw this as fulfillment of Joachim's prophecy. However, the actual development of both orders diverged from Joachim's idealized description.

prophecies.a: 在圣灵之纪到来之前，世界将经历敌基督的统治。敌基督将是一位世俗君主，他将迫害教会，腐蚀信仰。但他的统治将是短暂的，最终被神的力量击败，为圣灵时代的黎明扫清障碍。
prophecies.a_en: Before the Age of the Spirit arrives, the world would endure the rule of the Antichrist. The Antichrist would be a secular ruler who would persecute the Church and corrupt the faith. But his reign would be brief, ultimately defeated by divine power, clearing the way for the dawn of the Age of the Spirit.

prophecies.a: 当前的罗马教会已变得世俗化和腐败，如同旧约中堕落的以色列。教会将经历一场巨大的危机和净化，现有的制度化教会将衰落，取而代之的是以修道士为核心的新灵性共同体。教皇权威将让位于圣灵的直接引导。
prophecies.q_en: The Corruption and Purification of the Church
prophecies.a_en: The current Roman Church has become worldly and corrupt, like fallen Israel in the Old Testament. The Church would undergo a great crisis and purification; the existing institutional Church would decline, replaced by a new spiritual community centered on monks. Papal authority would give way to the direct guidance of the Holy Spirit.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 13至16世纪，罗马教会确实经历了严重的制度危机：阿维尼翁之囚（1309-1377）、西方大分裂（1378-1417）、文艺复兴教皇的腐败，最终引发了16世纪的宗教改革。新教运动在某种程度上呼应了约阿基姆对「教会中介消失、信徒直接与神沟通」的预见。但修道士主导的灵性共同体取代制度化教会的预言并未完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: From the 13th to 16th centuries, the Roman Church did experience severe institutional crises: the Avignon Papacy (1309-1377), the Western Schism (1378-1417), and the corruption of Renaissance popes, ultimately triggering the 16th-century Reformation. Protestantism echoed Joachim's vision of removing Church mediation and enabling direct communion with God. However, his prophecy of monk-led spiritual communities replacing the institutional Church was not fully realized.

prophecies.q: 萨拉森人与伊斯兰的威胁
prophecies.a: 萨拉森人（伊斯兰势力）是当前时代的主要敌人，他们是启示录中兽的化身之一。但这个威胁是暂时的——在敌基督被击败和圣灵之纪到来后，萨拉森人将皈依基督教，全世界将归于一个信仰。
prophecies.q_en: The Saracens and the Islamic Threat
prophecies.a_en: The Saracens (Islamic forces) are the chief enemy of the present age, embodying one of the beasts of Revelation. But this threat is temporary — after the defeat of the Antichrist and the arrival of the Age of the Spirit, the Saracens would convert to Christianity, and the whole world would be united under one faith.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 基督教世界与伊斯兰世界的冲突在十字军时代之后仍持续了数百年（奥斯曼帝国扩张、维也纳围城等），但伊斯兰世界从未整体皈依基督教。至今伊斯兰教拥有约19亿信徒，是世界第二大宗教。「全世界归于一个信仰」的预言明显未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Conflict between Christendom and the Islamic world continued for centuries after the Crusades (Ottoman expansion, Siege of Vienna, etc.), but the Islamic world never converted to Christianity en masse. Today Islam has approximately 1.9 billion adherents and is the world's second-largest religion. The prophecy of the whole world uniting under one faith has clearly not been fulfilled.

prophecies.a: 在圣灵之纪中，将会有一部「永恒福音」取代当前的新约圣经，正如新约曾取代旧约。这部永恒福音不是新的经书，而是对既有经文的灵性理解——人类将超越文字表面，直接领悟神圣真理的灵性含义。
prophecies.a_en: In the Age of the Spirit, an 'Eternal Gospel' would supersede the current New Testament, just as the New Testament superseded the Old. This Eternal Gospel would not be a new scripture, but a spiritual understanding of existing texts — humanity would transcend the literal surface and directly apprehend the spiritual meaning of divine truth.

prophecies.a: 如同神是圣父、圣子、圣灵三位一体，历史也具有三位一体的结构。每个时代不是对前一时代的否定，而是更高层次的实现。旧约中隐藏的含义在新约中显明，新约中未尽的应许将在圣灵时代圆满实现。历史是一个不断上升的螺旋，趋向最终的灵性圆满。
prophecies.a_en: Just as God is a Trinity of Father, Son, and Holy Spirit, history also has a trinitarian structure. Each age is not a negation of the previous one, but a higher fulfillment. The hidden meanings of the Old Testament are revealed in the New, and the unfulfilled promises of the New Testament will be fully realized in the Age of the Spirit. History is an ascending spiral, moving toward ultimate spiritual perfection.

prophecies.q: 第三次十字军东征的前景
prophecies.a: 约阿基姆曾在1190-1191年于墨西拿会见英王理查一世，就第三次十字军东征提供预言性建议。他表示萨拉丁代表了启示录中的七个迫害者之一，但最终基督徒将收复耶路撒冷，尽管不是通过这次东征。
prophecies.a_en: Joachim met King Richard I of England at Messina in 1190-1191 and offered prophetic counsel regarding the Third Crusade. He stated that Saladin represented one of the seven persecutors from Revelation, but Christians would ultimately recover Jerusalem, though not through this particular crusade.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 第三次十字军东征（1189-1192）未能收复耶路撒冷，仅通过谈判获得基督徒朝圣权。此后耶路撒冷在第六次十字军东征（1228-1229）中通过腓特烈二世的外交手段短暂回归基督教控制（1229-1244），但此后再未被十字军收复。约阿基姆对此次东征无法收复圣城的判断是正确的，但「最终收复」的预言仅短暂部分实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Third Crusade (1189-1192) failed to recapture Jerusalem, only securing pilgrimage rights through negotiation. Jerusalem briefly returned to Christian control during the Sixth Crusade (1228-1229) through Frederick II's diplomacy (1229-1244), but was never again recovered by crusaders. Joachim's assessment that this crusade would not recapture the Holy City was correct, but the prophecy of 'ultimate recovery' was only briefly and partially fulfilled.

prophecies.q: 启示录七封印的历史解读
prophecies.a: 启示录的七封印对应人类历史的七个阶段。前五封印已经过去，第六封印正在开启——这是一个充满磨难、异端和迫害的过渡时期。第七封印的开启将标志着圣灵之纪的正式到来，届时「天上寂静约有二刻」，象征着神圣的安宁与冥想。
prophecies.q_en: Historical Interpretation of the Seven Seals
prophecies.a_en: The seven seals of Revelation correspond to seven stages of human history. The first five seals have passed; the sixth seal is now being opened — a transitional period full of tribulation, heresy, and persecution. The opening of the seventh seal would mark the formal arrival of the Age of the Spirit, when 'there was silence in heaven for about half an hour,' symbolizing divine peace and contemplation.

prophecies.a: 在圣灵之纪中，犹太人将认识到耶稣基督的真理，全体归信基督教。这不是通过强迫或暴力，而是通过圣灵的光照和对经文灵性含义的领悟。犹太人的归信将是历史圆满的标志之一。
prophecies.q_en: The Final Conversion of the Jews
prophecies.a_en: In the Age of the Spirit, the Jewish people would recognize the truth of Jesus Christ and convert to Christianity collectively. This would happen not through coercion or violence, but through the illumination of the Holy Spirit and the apprehension of the spiritual meaning of Scripture. The conversion of the Jews would be one of the signs of historical fulfillment.

prophecies.q: 冥想生活将取代行动生活
prophecies.a: 在圣灵之纪中，玛尔大（象征行动生活）将让位于玛利亚（象征冥想生活）。人类将不再被世俗事务所束缚，而是进入纯粹的灵性冥想状态。修道院将成为新时代的中心，取代教堂和宫廷。整个世界将如同一座巨大的修道院。
prophecies.q_en: Contemplative Life Will Replace Active Life
prophecies.a_en: In the Age of the Spirit, Martha (symbolizing active life) would give way to Mary (symbolizing contemplative life). Humanity would no longer be bound by worldly affairs but would enter a state of pure spiritual contemplation. Monasteries would become the centers of the new age, replacing churches and courts. The whole world would become like one great monastery.
